title: taraxacum spiculiforme
intro: Taraxacum spiculiforme, also known as the spiny dandelion or false dandelion, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, characterized by its spiny leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum spiculiforme include reducing swelling and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum spiculiforme can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
